overview: Form-Data could be made to allow unintended access.
description:
Ben Shonaldmann discovered that Form-data incorrectly generated boundary
values for multipart form-encoded data, leading to predictable values. A
remote attacker could possibly use this issue to make arbitrary requests
to internal systems.

remote attacker could possibly use this issue to make arbitrary requests
to internal systems.
full_text:
Ubuntu Security Notices

USN-7976-1

 

 

 

 

 

 
USN-7976-1: Form-Data vulnerability

 

 

 

 
Publication date

 

 

 
26 January 2026

 

 

 

 

 
Overview

 

 

 
Form-Data could be made to allow unintended access.

 

 

 

 

 
Releases

 

 

 

 24.04 LTS

22.04 LTS

20.04 LTS

18.04 LTS

16.04 LTS

14.04 LTS

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Open side navigation
 

 

 
Packages

 

 node-form-data - A library to create readable ‘multipart/form-data’ streams
 

 

 
Details

 

 

Ben Shonaldmann discovered that Form-data incorrectly generated boundary
values for multipart form-encoded data, leading to predictable values. A
remote attacker could possibly use this issue to make arbitrary requests
to internal systems.

 

 

 

Ben Shonaldmann discovered that Form-data incorrectly generated boundary
values for multipart form-encoded data, leading to predictable values. A
remote attacker could possibly use this issue to make arbitrary requests
to internal systems.

 

 

 

 
Update instructions

 

 

 

 

In general, a standard system update will make all the necessary changes.

 Learn more about how to get the fixes.
 

 

 

 

 
The problem can be corrected by updating your system to the following package versions:

 

 

 

 

 Ubuntu Release
 Package Version
 

 24.04

LTS noble

 node-form-data – 

4.0.0-1ubuntu0.1

 

 22.04

LTS jammy

 node-form-data – 

3.0.1-1ubuntu0.1~esm1

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

 

 

 20.04

LTS focal

 node-form-data – 

3.0.0-2ubuntu0.1~esm1

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

LTS xenial

0.1.0-1ubuntu0.16.04.1~esm1

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

 

 

 14.04

0.1.0-1ubuntu0.14.04.1~esm1

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via Legacy Support add-on.

 Ubuntu Pro provides ten-year security coverage to 25,000+ packages in Main and Universe repositories, and it is free for up to five machines.
